etymology.description: 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 㚔 ("handcuff") = visual association with the act of gazing or examining
etymology.interpretation: The character 睪 (zé, "to gaze") combines 目(目) (mù, "eye") with 㚔 (a handcuff symbol), reinforcing the sense of visually selecting or scrutinizing something closely with the eyes. The connection between viewing and selecting is emphasized through the composition, linking the notion of observing with intent or purpose.
